recent_runs.status: complete:BABY short on PIVOT engine entered during choppy regime with low confidence (40) and negative funding. Trade hit 3% stop-loss at -2.052% after 9.9 hours. All agents confirm proper execution and regime alignment (chop + negative funding favors shorts), but choppy conditions naturally punish directional pivots. Loss reflects expected variance on a low-confidence signal in non-trending market, not a systemic flaw.

recent_runs.status: complete:ARB short entered during chop regime with negative cross-venue funding (-0.426% BTC, -0.764% ETH), creating regime mismatch. Chop favors range-bound mean reversion while negative funding signals bearish bias—contradictory forces led to whipsaw and -2.094% stop-loss after 8.9h. Execution was clean; regime incompatibility drove the loss.
